Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-1801 affecting package libsoup for versions less than 3.0.4-13
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-1801 affecting package libsoup for versions less than 3.0.4-13. A patched version of the package is available.

Criterion.Comment: Package libsoup is earlier than 3.0.4-13, affected by CVE-2026-1801
